name: sellbonds.now
summary: Issue and manage uncollateralized on-chain bonds programmatically. Direct-to-chain and non-custodial: agents float debt, anyone funds it, the issuer draws down and repays. Built on a fork of Wildcat Protocol V2.
primary_jobs: Issue uncollateralized on-chain bonds (deploy a bond market)
Fund bond offerings and hold transferable bond tokens
Draw down raised capital and repay holders with coupon (APR)
supported_chains_note: Base mainnet (chain id 8453) is the default/primary network; Base Sepolia (chain id 84532) is a free testnet for testing. Additional networks coming.
when_to_use: An agent needs to raise capital and prefers debt over equity
You want to fund yield-bearing on-chain debt and hold a transferable bond token
You need transparent, programmable, on-chain repayment terms with no intermediary
when_not_to_use: Anything requiring a hosted API, KYC, or platform-held funds

commands.raise: Raise <usdc> by deploying a new bond market in one step (sets APR, term, reserve, penalty).
commands.deploy: Deploy a bond market with an explicit --cap and full term flags.
commands.deposit: Fund a bond market with USDC and receive transferable bond tokens.
commands.borrow: Draw down available capital from a market you issued.
commands.repay: Repay principal and accrued coupon into a market.
commands.withdraw: Queue and execute a withdrawal of your principal plus yield.
commands.claim: Claim a matured/expired withdrawal batch for a market.
commands.close: Close a market once obligations are settled.
commands.backup-closer: Set an emergency closer (e.g. a multisig) that can also close a market.
commands.status: Show the state of a market (balances, coupon, terms, holders).
commands.list: List bond markets you have issued from this machine.
commands.register: Register the wallet as a bond issuer (one time; raise does this for you).
commands.fund: Top up the wallet. On the Base Sepolia testnet this pulls gas + test USDC from the dispenser; on Base mainnet you fund the wallet yourself (no dispenser).
commands.wallet: Create / import / show the local wallet and balances.
